special_mechanics.name: Plunger Gun
special_mechanics.description: Donald is armed with a special gun that shoots plungers. Unlimited plungers can temporarily stun enemies and are later upgraded to act as temporary platforms for climbing walls. When stuck to passing birds, allows traversal of longer distances.

special_mechanics.name: Quack Attack Mode
special_mechanics.description: Activated by collecting spicy jalapeños in overland sections (Duckburg, India, Egypt). Temporarily grants invincibility, forces automatic forward running, and knocks out enemies in path.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF) contain no precise physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or movement values. Game described as having 'slower pace compared to action games' but no quantitative movement metrics documented.
